title: Thus Spake Koto, Our Protagonist
overview: Koto recalls the teachings of her teacher, Inari.

title: Shouko, The Scientist, Raves and Panics
overview: Scientist Shouko searches frantically across Kyoto for her remote control device.

title: Yase, the Youkai Looking Glass Report
overview: As Yase has one of her lackies shoot a television program following a yearly event in which unneeded objects mysteriously float away, Koto and co try to stop a young girl from being taken away with them.
